translation_policy.note: Use the public-domain World English Bible unless an approved day explicitly records another translation.

editorial_purpose: Create a connected daily journey that makes room for hardship, hope, joy, courage, practical love, and rest without reusing or overlapping verses.
planning_rules: Every passage must list each canonical verse it contains in verse_ids.
No verse_id may appear on more than one day unless an intentional recurring anchor is approved and documented.
Plan in thematic arcs, with each day handing one clear idea to the next.
Balance hard-times, uplifting, balanced, and practical tones across each planning block.
Balance Gospel, narrative, wisdom, psalm, prophetic, and epistle passages over time.
A planned day is not final copy. Scripture wording and immediate context must be checked before the audio script is drafted.

theme_arcs.title: Come Close
theme_arcs.movement: Arrive safely, receive peace, remain with Jesus, remember belonging, begin to grow, love others, and practice joyful generosity.

theme_arcs.title: Held in the Storm
theme_arcs.movement: Name pain honestly, discover God's nearness, receive courage, persevere without pretending, and end in renewed hope.

theme_arcs.title: Seen and Loved
theme_arcs.movement: Move from being personally known and delighted in to releasing anxiety, receiving purpose, shining gently, and rediscovering joy.

theme_arcs.title: Love in Motion
theme_arcs.movement: Turn inner renewal into mercy, character, listening, trust, courage, encouragement, gratitude, and a closing blessing.

days.title: Come and Rest
days.human_question: Can I come to Jesus while I am exhausted?
days.carry_forward: Rest makes room to receive Christ's peace.

days.title: My Peace for You
days.human_question: Can peace remain when circumstances are uncertain?
days.carry_forward: Peace grows through staying connected to Jesus.

days.title: Remain in Me
days.human_question: Must I create a faithful life through effort alone?
days.carry_forward: Connection leads into secure belonging.

days.title: I Have Called You by Name
days.human_question: Am I known and accompanied in deep waters?
days.carry_forward: Belonging creates freedom to be transformed.

days.title: A Life That Grows
days.human_question: How does lasting change begin?
days.carry_forward: Inner renewal becomes visible through love.

days.title: Love God and Your Neighbor
days.human_question: What does a renewed life look like today?
days.carry_forward: Love becomes tangible when it is freely and joyfully given.

days.title: The Joy of Giving
days.human_question: Can generosity grow from joy instead of pressure or fear?
days.carry_forward: Open hands can give freely and also receive God's restoring care.

days.title: He Restores My Soul
days.human_question: Can rest be part of moving forward?
days.carry_forward: The Shepherd's care remains present when the path becomes difficult.

days.title: Hope While You Wait
days.human_question: Can faith and discouragement exist together?
days.carry_forward: Honest hope opens the heart to courage.

days.title: Do Not Be Afraid
days.human_question: What can hold me when fear feels stronger than I am?
days.carry_forward: Courage becomes concrete when a storm is named.

days.title: Peace in the Storm
days.human_question: Is Jesus present when everything feels out of control?
days.carry_forward: Calm does not deny that pressure can continue.

days.title: Pressed, but Not Abandoned
days.human_question: Can I be struggling without being defeated?
days.carry_forward: Endurance is renewed by mercy, not denial.

days.title: New Every Morning
days.human_question: What remains when yesterday was painful?
days.carry_forward: Daily mercy makes room for hope to overflow.

days.title: Filled with Hope
days.human_question: Can hope become more than wishful thinking?
days.carry_forward: Hope prepares the listener to see themselves through God's loving attention.

days.title: Wonderfully Made
days.human_question: Can I receive my life as something known and valuable?
days.carry_forward: Being known opens the heart to being delighted in.

days.title: He Delights in You
days.human_question: Does God merely tolerate me, or delight in me?
days.carry_forward: Secure love makes it safer to release anxiety.

days.title: Place Your Cares in His Hands
days.human_question: What can I do with the worries I keep carrying?
days.carry_forward: Releasing a burden creates space for prayerful peace.

days.title: Peace That Guards You
days.human_question: How can prayer meet anxiety without shaming me for feeling it?
days.carry_forward: A guarded heart is free to rediscover purpose.

days.title: Created with Purpose
days.human_question: Does my ordinary life have meaningful work within it?
days.carry_forward: Purpose becomes light offered for others.

days.title: Let Your Light Shine
days.human_question: How can I offer something good without performing for approval?
days.carry_forward: Light offered freely leads into joy in God's presence.

days.title: The Path of Life
days.human_question: Can joy be received as a way of walking with God?
days.carry_forward: Joy turns outward through a just and merciful life.

days.title: Walk Humbly
days.human_question: What does God ask of me in ordinary life?
days.carry_forward: A humble walk is clothed in compassion.

days.title: Clothed in Compassion
days.human_question: What qualities can I carry into my relationships?
days.carry_forward: Practiced compassion slowly forms Christlike character.

days.title: Fruit That Grows
days.human_question: What kind of person is the Spirit forming me to become?
days.carry_forward: Gentleness becomes especially visible through listening.

days.title: Quick to Listen
days.human_question: How can I bring peace into a difficult conversation?
days.carry_forward: Listening loosens the need to control every outcome.

days.title: Trust the Path
days.human_question: How do I move forward when I cannot see the whole way?
days.carry_forward: Trust makes courageous action possible.

days.title: Strong and Courageous
days.human_question: Can I take the next step while I still feel afraid?
days.carry_forward: Courage grows stronger in encouraging community.

days.title: Encourage One Another
days.human_question: How can hope become something we sustain together?
days.carry_forward: Shared hope makes gratitude a daily rhythm.

days.title: A Rhythm of Joy
days.human_question: What simple rhythm can keep my heart open to God?
days.carry_forward: Gratitude prepares the heart to receive and share blessing.

days.title: May God Give You Peace
days.human_question: Can I end this season by receiving rather than achieving?
days.carry_forward: Carry blessing and peace into the next stage of the journey.
